description: Per-MDS metadata server health, cache, and request metrics via Thanos Querier
technicalNotes: Discovers MDS daemons from ceph_mds_metadata. Returns 0 instances when CephFS is not deployed. ODF with CephFS StorageClass deploys 2 MDS daemons (1 active + 1 standby).
name: ODF_Ceph_MDS_Health
